nodes.label: CubeJS Auth Config
nodes.rationale: Verifies Keycloak JWT tokens and normalizes claims into CubeJS security context for multi-tenant isolation.

nodes.label: Visualizacion Design Requirements
nodes.rationale: Defines the 3-panel architecture (Source, Config, Preview) for the visualization configurator.

nodes.label: Backend Architecture
nodes.rationale: FastAPI backend using SQLAlchemy for ORM and Alembic for migrations, with Keycloak integration for auth.

nodes.label: Designer Role
nodes.rationale: Users with this role can create, edit, and delete dashboards and configure widgets.

nodes.label: Viewer Role
nodes.rationale: Users with this role can only view public or assigned dashboards.

nodes.label: Free Positioning Grid System
nodes.rationale: Implements a 12-column canvas with absolute positioning, drag & resize, and snapping logic.

nodes.label: LocalStorage Persistence
nodes.rationale: Used for 'sin backend' mode, storing auth, dashboards, widgets, and mock users directly in the browser.

nodes.label: CubeJS Semantic Layer
nodes.rationale: Acts as the data source for dashboards, providing a metadata schema and SQL generation.

nodes.label: Apache ECharts Integration
nodes.rationale: Uses vue-echarts to render various chart types (bar, line, pie, gauge, radar) with deep-merged custom options.

nodes.label: AI Assist Rationale
nodes.rationale: Permitir al usuario exportar e inspeccionar el Artifact (JSON puro) generado por la IA antes de aplicar cambios al canvas, aumentando la transparencia y confianza en las sugerencias del LLM.

nodes.label: IntegraciÃ³n con Keycloak
nodes.rationale: GestiÃ³n de roles (admin, designer, viewer) centralizada para asegurar el acceso a dashboards y modelos segÃºn el perfil del usuario.

nodes.label: Dimensional Model Designer UI
nodes.rationale: Provides a canvas-based interface for ER diagrams and a modal for defining new dimensional models within 'Knowledge Spaces'.

nodes.label: Platform Home Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Entry point for users, displaying high-level KPIs (Total Dashboards, Active Widgets) and quick actions for creation.

nodes.label: My Dashboards View
nodes.rationale: Management interface for existing dashboards like 'Concesionaria' and 'GestiÃ³n de Proyectos', including activity summaries.

nodes.label: Data Type Modeler (DataForge)
nodes.rationale: Interface for defining reusable SQL data types (Serial, Money, etc.) to ensure precision and validation across models.

nodes.label: Docker Infrastructure
nodes.rationale: Orchestrates Postgres, Keycloak (Auth), Redis (Cache), CubeJS (Analytics API), and the FastAPI backend.

nodes.label: Concesionarias Dimensional Model
nodes.rationale: Defines automotive sales tracking with facts like fct_ventas and dimensions like dim_tiendas and dim_vendedores.

nodes.label: Project Management Dimensional Model
nodes.rationale: Tracks project execution metrics through fct_horasreportadas and fct_asignaciontareas across dimensions like dim_colaborador and dim_milestone.

nodes.label: Global Dimensions
nodes.rationale: Standardizes cross-model dimensions such as dim_date, dim_person, and dim_company.

nodes.label: Dashboard Designer Enhancements
nodes.rationale: Requirements for an 'Edit Dashboard' sidebar, color palettes, and configurable filter panel positions.

nodes.label: Secure Embedding & Pop-out Sync
nodes.rationale: Specifies JWT-based secure embedding and real-time state synchronization using Broadcast Channel API.

nodes.label: Currency Selection Task
nodes.rationale: Instructions to implement a currency selector in the chart configuration modal, requiring backend migrations and frontend store updates.

nodes.label: Models Management Menu
nodes.rationale: Design for a new 'Models' menu to manage dimensional schemas with ER diagramming and DDL generation capabilities.

nodes.label: Multi-Diagram Design
nodes.rationale: Allows splitting complex dimensional models into multiple sub-diagrams while maintaining data synchronization.

nodes.label: Table Selection Sidebar
nodes.rationale: Replaces the 'Add Table' button with a collapsible sidebar supporting drag-and-drop for fact and dimension entities.

nodes.label: Drill-Down Implementation Roadmap
nodes.rationale: Phased approach for dynamic chart navigation, prioritizing state management (Pinia) before UI implementation.

nodes.label: Drill-Down Functional Spec
nodes.rationale: Defines hierarchy-based navigation in widgets using Cube.js dimensions and cumulative filters.

nodes.label: Drill-Down State Logic Spec
nodes.rationale: Technical details for the Pinia store, including DrillStep and WidgetDrillState models for reversibility.
